raw_panel.message: Raw panel contains one row per account-month and no future/target columns.

feature_columns.message: Model feature list excludes forward target and timing metadata.

time_split.message: Train, calibration, and test windows are strictly ordered by time.

target_window.message: Target population uses current rows with complete forward outcome windows.

watchlist_capacity.message: Watchlist respects monthly top-k review capacity.
